title: Contract Signature
description: Complete your contract signature using SignNow

loading.title: Preparing Your Contract
loading.description: Connecting to SignNow and generating your contract...

success.title: Contract Ready
success.description: Your contract has been prepared via SignNow.
success.alert: Your contract has been prepared and is ready for signature. Please check your email for signing instructions.

processing.title: Contract Processing
processing.description: Your contract has been sent. You'll receive an email with signing instructions.

noData.title: No Data Found
noData.description: Please complete the subscription form first.

integration.title: Integration Error
integration.description: Unable to connect to SignNow. Please try again later.

error.failed: Failed to initialize SignNow integration. Please try again.

interface.title: Contract Signature Interface
interface.description: Complete the signature process below. If you experience any issues, try opening in a new tab.
